name: Spicy Rice Balls
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Ground Beef or Bulk Sausage
recipeInstructions:
Servings: 6
Combine all ingredients except tomato soup, water and hot sauce. Mix together well. Make balls about 1 inch in diameter. Place in baking dish. Combine tomato soup, water and hot sauce and pour over meatballs. Bake, covered, in a 350°F oven for 1 hour. Makes 30-36 small meatballs. Serve with toothpicks as hors d'oeuvres.
